rulings.Case Title: MILAN BACOKA et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Re-Open Discovery For The Limited Purpose Of Taking The Deposition Of Witness Dr. Richard Luros
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, JULY 9, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Plaintiffs' motion to re-open discovery for the limited purpose of taking the deposition of Dr. Richard Luros is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: HAROLD KOEPKE et al VS. FORD MOTOR COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Vwgoas Motion And Motion For Protective Order To Preclude Depositions Of Richard Bandstra, Thomas Zorn, And Further Deposition Of Defendant Volkswagen Group Of America On Irrelevant Topics
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, JULY 9, 2014 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 2, Defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.'s motion for protective order to preclude depositions of Richard Bandstra and Thomas Zorn and a further deposition of defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc.: Hearing Required as to the sanctions issue only. The hearing will be at 8:30a.m., not 9:00 a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
